---
name: security-code-review
description: Review pull requests for security vulnerabilities including OWASP Top 10, injection flaws, and authentication bypasses. Use when the user asks for a security audit, vulnerability scan, or secure code review. Not for general code style reviews — use code-style-review for formatting and linting.
---

# Security Code Review

This skill performs deep security analysis of code changes, focusing on:

- OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities
- SQL/NoSQL injection vectors
- Authentication and authorization flaws
- Sensitive data exposure risks
- Input validation gaps

## Usage

Use this skill when reviewing PRs that touch authentication logic, database queries, user input handling, or API endpoints.
